text: UAE CBUAE Law mandates licensing for open finance and virtual asset payment services
Deadline approaching: UAE firms must regularise virtual asset payment activities by September 2026
UAE Securities and Commodities Authority reconstituted as Capital Market Authority from January 2026
DFSA updates crypto token regulatory framework including stablecoin treatment effective January 2026

UAE businesses face mandatory e-invoicing deadline in July 2026
UAE fintech market reaches 52 billion dollars in 2026 with rapid AI adoption
DIFC firms report 52 percent AI technology adoption reflecting institutional integration surge
Saudi Arabia SAMA updates payment system framework affecting fintech and banking providers
GCC markets including Saudi Arabia and Qatar developing AI finance frameworks under Vision 2030
